name: federal-register-mcp
description: MCP server for the Federal Register. Proposed rules, final rules, notices, executive orders, FAR cases, and regulatory tracking.
long_description:
Queries the Federal Register API for published proposed rules, final rules, notices, and executive orders since 1994. Includes comment period tracking, FAR case history, and full-text search across agency documents.

8 tools. No authentication required.

Hardened across 5 audit rounds with 182 regression tests (22.8 per tool). 32 items addressed including 2 P2 None-handling bugs surfaced in round 5 Hypothesis property tests (_validate_doc_number(None) raised AttributeError; _clean_error_body(None) raised TypeError). Round 5 added Hypothesis-driven property tests (~25,000 random probes) plus 100+ live tests across 30 federal agencies, all 4 doc types, 28 search terms, and concurrent calls.
